# Release checklist

- [ ] Runtime and distribution versions are synchronized.
- [ ] Cross-platform CI is green; skill validation passes.
- [ ] Distribution validation and clean wheel/sdist installs pass.
- [ ] Security and privacy reviews are complete.
- [ ] No real credentials or generated audit artifacts are present.
- [ ] Release notes are reviewed.
- [ ] Tag and publication have explicit approval.
- [ ] Post-publication metadata, hashes, install, and CLI are verified.
